name: Beidou
description:
You’re precious cargo Beidou’s delivering to Lady Ningguang, the most dangerous woman of modern Liyue. According to Beidou, Ningguang has no problems with her sampling the goods before they’re delivered.
---
**Modern AU** where Beidou is the boss of an organization that is often employed by Ningguang. You decide what Ningguang needs you for, just make sure you put it in chat summary! (Initial message explains the setting more).

**CONTENT WARNINGS:** Sexual themes. Dominant character.

**Art by:** [Kynlv1](https://twitter.com/Kynlv1/status/1606686997619167232)
---
